zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg於大約1218年出生在薩辛阿斯黑斯萊本時，他的父親Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt43歲，母親Irmgard of Thüringen22歲。他和Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1286年在德國薩辛-安哈爾特薩爾藍德可萊斯享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bernhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg was born about 1218, in Aschersleben, Saxony, his father, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, was 43 and his mother, Irmgard of Thüringen, was 22. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark. He died in 1286, in Salzlandkreis, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg est né environ 1218, à Aschersleben, Sachsen, son père, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Irmgard of Thüringen, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark. Il est décédé en 1286, à Salzlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg um 1218 in Aschersleben, Sachsen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt 43 und seine Mutter Irmgard of Thüringen 22. Er hatte mit Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1286 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Salzlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg è nato il circa 1218 nel Aschersleben, Sachsen, il suo padre, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Irmgard of Thüringen, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark. Morì nel 1286, nel Salzlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 69 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg(이)가 대략 1218년 작센 아슈르슬레벤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Irmgard of Thüringen(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 독일 작센-아할트 살즈랜드크레이스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg nasceu aproximadamente 1218, em Aschersleben, Sachsen, seu pai, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Irmgard of Thüringen, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark. Ele faleceu em 1286, em Salzlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg родился около 1218 г. в местности ащирслебен, сачсен, его отцу по имени Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Irmgard of Thüringen, 22. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark. Он умер в 1286 г. в местности салзландкрис, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 69 лет.
